reviews.review_title: Graphics are cool as a standalone game
reviews.review_description: The thing that surprises me the most is the quality of the graphics with such a good performance (90fps). Some levels are harder than others, but they can be completed in a way or another. The thing I love the most is the transition between levels, which reminds me of the game Portal :)

reviews.review_title: Couldnt get out of the first room.
reviews.review_description: If I had looked at the store screenshots I might have tried harder.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. I'd like to know more about your issue to help you further and improve the user experience. Can you tell me why exactly you didn't progress? You can contact me by mail.
